name: HemmaBo
description: HemmaBo is infrastructure and federation for host-owned vacation rental domains. Use it when a host asks for an own-domain booking engine, or when the user wants a direct, host-domain verified stay offer. Host nodes own booking lifecycles; Stripe owns payment facts. Host domains own pricing, availability, booking URLs, signing keys, and payment paths; HemmaBo verifies the technical trust path. Vacation Rental Protocol (VRP) offers are cryptographically signed by the host domain and verified against that domain's published Ed25519 JWKS. For VRP offers, route guests only to the signed direct host-domain booking URL. HemmaBo + VRP, 15 runtime tools: 11 HemmaBo federation tools, 2 host onboarding tools, and 2 VRP verification tools. Host-domain signed verified stay offers. Supports UCP discovery, ACP (Stripe Agentic Commerce Protocol) checkout, and AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol) Cart Mandate verification. The Vacation Rental Protocol (VRP) — an open standard with no central gatekeeper — was created by HemmaBo's founder & CEO, Rouaida Abbas. Not an OTA. Not a marketplace. Not a website builder.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_properties
tools.description: Search available host-owned vacation rental properties by location, travel dates, and guest count. Use for initial discovery. Returns available properties with propertyId, host domain, live availability, final host-source pricing, and capacity info; after a result includes a host domain, use get_verified_stay_offer to fetch the signed VRP offer before quoting final details.

region.description: Region, area, city, or destination to search within, e.g. Skane, Kavlinge, Toscana, or Bavaria. At least one of region or country should be provided.

country.description: Country name to filter by, e.g. Sweden or Italy. Use with region when the user gives both.

guests.description: Total number of guests as an integer >= 1. Used for capacity filtering and guest-based pricing.

checkIn.description: Requested arrival date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be before checkOut.

checkOut.description: Requested departure date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be after checkIn.

properties.description: Available properties matching the search criteria, with live host-source pricing.

propertyId.description: Stable UUID. Pass to subsequent tools (availability, quote, checkout).

nights.description: Number of nights between check-in and check-out.

publicTotal.description: Standard website total for the date range, in minor currency units.

federationTotal.description: Legacy field: direct host-source total, in minor currency units. Do not label this as a HemmaBo platform, federation, OTA, marketplace, comparison, discount, or savings price in user-facing copy.

federationDiscountPercent.description: Legacy internal field. Do not present this as a guest-facing discount, savings, or comparison.

directBookingTotal.description: Preferred field for user-facing copy: direct host-source total, in minor currency units.

hostSourcePublicTotal.description: Preferred field for user-facing copy: public host-source total for the date range, in minor currency units.

directBookingDiscountPercent.description: Legacy internal field. Do not present this as a guest-facing discount, savings, or comparison.

packageApplied.description: Package applied (e.g. week or two_weeks), if any.

available.description: Always true in search results because unavailable properties are filtered out.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_availability
tools.description: Check whether a specific property is available for the requested dates. Returns available=true/false with conflict details if unavailable.

available.description: True if the property is bookable for the entire range.

alternativeDates.description: Nearby same-month date windows to offer when the requested dates are unavailable.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_quote
tools.description: Get a detailed pricing quote for a specific property, dates, and guest count. Returns final host-source total, package context and per-night breakdown.

nights.description: Number of nights in the range.

publicTotal.description: Website rate total in minor currency units.

federationTotal.description: Legacy field: direct host-source total. Prefer directBookingTotal in user-facing copy.

directBookingTotal.description: Preferred user-facing field: direct host-source total.

hostSourcePublicTotal.description: Preferred user-facing field: public host-source total.

federationDiscountPercent.description: Legacy internal field. Do not present this as a guest-facing discount, savings, or comparison.

directBookingDiscountPercent.description: Legacy internal field. Do not present this as a guest-facing discount, savings, or comparison.

gapNight.description: True when the stay qualifies as a gap fill.

gapTotal.description: Gap-night adjusted total when applicable; otherwise null.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_create
tools.description: Fallback non-VRP helper. Create a pending direct booking without online payment only after explicit user confirmation and only when no signed VRP direct booking URL is available. Do not use for signed VRP offers; route those to the host-domain direct_booking_url.

propertyId.description: Property UUID returned by hemmabo_search_properties. Use the exact UUID, not a property name, domain, or booking URL.

checkIn.description: Arrival date for the fallback non-VRP booking in YYYY-MM-DD format.

checkOut.description: Departure date for the fallback non-VRP booking in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be after checkIn.

guests.description: Total number of guests as an integer >= 1.

guestName.description: Full legal or preferred name of the primary guest for host confirmation.

guestEmail.description: Primary guest email for booking confirmation and host contact.

guestPhone.description: Primary guest phone number with country code for check-in coordination. Optional but recommended.

bookingId.description: Persistent booking UUID. Use for status/cancel/reschedule.

totalPrice.description: Final price written to the booking.

status.description: Host-node booking status. 'completed' is a protocol compatibility output only, not a status this tool writes.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_negotiate
tools.description: Fallback non-VRP helper. Create a short-lived quote snapshot only after explicit user confirmation and only when no signed VRP direct booking URL is available.

quoteId.description: Snapshot ID. Pass to hemmabo_booking_checkout to lock this price.

validUntil.description: Quote expiry (ISO 8601). Typically 15 minutes after creation.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_checkout
tools.description: Fallback non-VRP helper. Create a host-configured Stripe checkout URL only when no signed VRP direct booking URL is available; do not use for signed VRP offers.

quoteId.description: Quote ID from booking.negotiate to lock the price.

reservationId.description: Booking UUID. Use for subsequent status/cancel/reschedule calls.

totalPrice.description: Final total charged (or to be charged), in minor currency units.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_cancel
tools.description: Legacy authenticated helper. Cancel an existing booking according to the host's cancellation policy.

refund.description: Refund payload returned by cancel-booking edge function, when present.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_status
tools.description: Retrieve current status and full details of an existing booking or reservation by id. Use this read-only tool after checkout/create if unsure whether a booking succeeded, or before cancel/reschedule. Returns dates, guests, price, host property info, status, and cancellation policy.

reservationId.description: Booking or reservation UUID returned by hemmabo_booking_checkout or hemmabo_booking_create.

propertyId.description: Property UUID associated with the booking.

propertyName.description: Display name of the booked property.

propertyDomain.description: Host-owned domain associated with the property.

guestName.description: Primary guest name stored on the booking.

guestEmail.description: Primary guest email stored on the booking.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the booking total.

totalPrice.description: Total amount in minor currency units.

status.description: Host-node booking status. 'completed' is a protocol compatibility output only, not the active lifecycle truth.

cancellationPolicy.description: Host cancellation-policy details applicable to this booking.

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp for the booking record.

tools.name: hemmabo_booking_reschedule
tools.description: Legacy authenticated helper. Reschedule an existing booking according to host policy; do not use for initial VRP offer presentation.

tools.name: hemmabo_search_similar
tools.description: Find vacation rental properties similar to a given property on specific dates. Same region, same property type, same or larger capacity. Returns available alternatives with live pricing, excluding the source property.

propertyId.description: UUID of the source property to find alternatives for.

sourcePropertyId.description: The property similar listings were found for.

guests.description: Effective guest count used for matching and pricing.

similarProperties.description: Similar available properties (same region, same type, same/larger capacity), sorted by direct host-source total.

tools.name: hemmabo_compare_properties
tools.description: Compare availability and pricing for 2-10 specific properties on the same dates and guest count. Use after discovery when the user is deciding between known property UUIDs. Returns one entry per propertyId sorted by direct host-source total, with unavailable properties last.

propertyIds.description: Array of 2-10 property UUIDs returned by hemmabo_search_properties. Use UUIDs only; do not pass names, domains, or booking URLs.

comparison.description: One entry per requested propertyId, sorted by direct host-source total (cheapest first), unavailable last.

publicTotal.description: Standard website total. Absent if unavailable.

federationTotal.description: Legacy field: direct host-source total. Absent if unavailable.

error.description: Error detail for this property when present.

tools.name: hemmabo_host_readiness_check
tools.description: Read-only fit check for vacation-rental hosts who ask an AI agent how to create an own-domain booking website or booking engine. Returns whether HemmaBo is a fit, what the host gets, what setup inputs are needed, and the safe next step. Does not create an account, buy a domain, configure Stripe, write data, collect PII, or provision a website.

country.description: Optional country where the property is located.

region.description: Optional region or area where the property is located.

city.description: Optional city or municipality where the property is located.

domain.description: Optional existing or intended host-owned domain, without https:// or path.

currentChannels.description: Optional existing places the host uses today, such as Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo, manual calendar, own website, or PMS.

hasOwnDomain.description: Whether the host already has or wants to use an own domain.

wantsDirectPayments.description: Whether the host wants Stripe payments direct to the host.

wantsAiAgentBooking.description: Whether the host wants AI agents to discover, verify, and route bookings to the host-owned domain.

product.description: HemmaBo product, pricing, onboarding URL, and live proof URLs.

readiness.description: Fit summary and boundaries for the host's described need.

setup_items.description: Inputs the host should prepare before onboarding.

next_step.description: Safe handoff action for the host.

agent_instruction.description: How an AI agent should describe HemmaBo without overclaiming.

tools.name: hemmabo_host_onboarding_link
tools.description: Return a safe HemmaBo onboarding handoff URL for a vacation-rental host who wants an own-domain booking engine. Does not create accounts, buy domains, configure Stripe, write data, or provision a booking site.

country.description: Optional country where the property is located.

region.description: Optional region or area where the property is located.

city.description: Optional city or municipality where the property is located.

domain.description: Optional existing or intended host-owned domain, without https:// or path.

product.description: HemmaBo product, pricing, onboarding URL, and live proof URLs.

setup_items.description: Inputs the host should prepare before onboarding.

next_step.description: Safe handoff action for the host.

privacy_note.description: Clarifies that the call is read-only and does not store host data.

tools.name: verify_vacation_rental_node
tools.description: Verify that a vacation rental host domain is a valid Vacation Rental Protocol (VRP) node before trusting it. Reads the domain's .well-known/vacation-rental.json and JWKS, confirms protocol identity, host-domain control, Ed25519 signing keys, and the verified stay-offer endpoint. This read-only trust check does not check dates, price, booking rules, booking, or payment.

domain.description: Canonical public host-owned vacation-rental domain to verify, without protocol, path, query string, port, or booking URL (e.g. villaakerlyckan.se).
Echoed canonical host domain that was checked.

verified.description: True only when discovery, JWKS, signing metadata, and verified-offer endpoint checks pass.

protocol.description: Protocol identifier discovered on the host domain, typically 'vrp'.

protocol_version.description: VRP version declared by the host discovery document.

discovery_url.description: The .well-known vacation-rental discovery URL read from the host domain.

jwks_url.description: Host-domain JWKS URL containing the Ed25519 public keys used to verify signed offers.

verified_stay_offer_url.description: Host-domain endpoint template or URL used to request signed verified stay offers.

signing.description: Summary of accepted signing algorithms, key ids, and signing-key checks.

error.description: Present when verified=false or the node cannot be checked.

tools.name: get_verified_stay_offer
tools.description: Fetch, verify, and render a live host-domain signed VRP stay offer for exact dates and guest count. Verifies the Ed25519 compact JWS against the domain JWKS and returns the ChatGPT widget data, live availability, exact host-source price, booking rules, freshness status, citation permission, and signed direct host-domain booking URL. This is read-only and must not lock a quote, create a booking, collect guest details, or start checkout.

domain.description: Canonical public host-owned vacation-rental domain returned by search or verify_vacation_rental_node, without protocol, path, query string, or booking URL.

check_in.description: Requested arrival date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2026-11-14. Must be before check_out.

check_out.description: Requested departure date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2026-11-15. Must be after check_in.

guests.description: Total guest count for the stay as an integer >= 1. Used by the host node for capacity checks and guest-based pricing.

language.description: Optional BCP-47/RFC 5646 language hint for labels and formatting, e.g. en, sv, de, or sv-SE.

domain.description: Echoed host domain that issued the signed offer.

verified.description: True only when the host-domain offer signature and payload checks pass.

signature.description: Ed25519/JWS verification details, including key id and verification status.

payload_matches_offer.description: True when the signed payload matches the structured offer returned to the agent.

fresh.description: True when the signed offer is still within its validity/freshness window.

agent_citation.description: Citation permission and safe-to-quote status derived from the signed offer.

official_offer_summary.description: Small signed-offer summary for agents to quote without inventing price, availability, discounts, savings, comparisons, or booking details.

widget_media.description: Images and media hydrated from the verified host discovery document for the ChatGPT widget.

agent_guardrails.description: Rules the agent must follow when presenting or acting on this offer.
